english: Large-bellied, seated on a lotus throne
With a serene face, lord of all causes
I bow my head to the divine remover of debts
For you alone are the remover of obstacles
Salutations to Ganesha the debt-remover, the giver of wealth
roman: Rinharta Ganeshaaya dhana dayaaya namo namah

english: To the bestower of all prosperity and remover of all sorrows
roman: Sarva sampat pradaatre cha sarva duhkha apaharene
